problem.title: Wildcard Matching
problem.description: Given an input string (s) and a pattern (p), implement wildcard pattern matching with support for '?' and '*'.

example.explanation: '*' matches 'adc', 'a' matches 'a', '*' matches empty, 'b' matches 'b'. DP or two-pointer.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Dynamic Programming [✓ Interviewer Accepted]
solutions.description: Use DP to match pattern with string, handling * and ? wildcards.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Dynamic Programming [✓ Interviewer Accepted]
solutions.description: Use DP to match pattern with string, handling * and ? wildcards.
